issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path.

scenarios.name: TinaCMS blog posts with live visual editing in Next.js
scenarios.rationale: Baseline points to defineConfig generally but misses the isTitle/isBody/format: 'mdx' field markers, the useTina({ query, variables, data }) live-editing hook, and the npx tinacms dev -c 'next dev' wrapping command.

scenarios.name: Visual page builder with Hero and Features blocks
scenarios.rationale: Baseline understands the blocks pattern but misses Tina's specific object + list: true + templates schema, the per-template fields definition, and rendering via the generated @/tina/__generated__/client + TinaMarkdown.
